Who I am

Nothing was given.
Everything earned.

I was cut from my soccer team at 15 on the last day of the signing period. No options. No fallback. I dropped two levels, rebuilt from the ground up, and three years later the coach who cut me wanted me back. I said no.

That pattern — setback, shift, growth, elevation — has defined every chapter since. From the last-place college team that became a top-25 program, to a 45th overall MLS Draft pick, to helping ratify the first-ever USL Championship Collective Bargaining Agreement, to retiring and making my first cold call three months later.

Nothing in my career has been handed to me. Every opportunity — I created. Every door — I knocked on it first.

CR Academy

Elite youth coaching, built from nothing.

Founded during the playing career. 50+ families. 4 camps. 250+ athletes. The same standards that built a pro career — now developing the next generation.

The career

Seven years across
four clubs and one standard.

2019 – 2020
Sporting KC II
37 appearances. 45th overall MLS Draft pick. First exposure to professional labor advocacy via MLSPA.
View chapter →
2021
RGV FC Toros
McAllen, TX. Full Spanish immersion. Helped ratify the first-ever USL Championship Collective Bargaining Agreement.
View chapter →
2022 – 2023
San Diego Loyal SC
58+ appearances. ABC 10News & Fox 5 TV features. Founded CR Academy. Community face of the club.
View chapter →
2024 – 2025
Oakland Roots SC
Captain. Union rep. Keynote speaker. 2025 Roots Righteous Award — Man of the Year. Oakland, home.
View chapter →
2025 – Present
Revenue Vessel
SDR at a venture-backed logistics SaaS. Post-ramp quota hit within months. New arena. Same standards.
View chapter →
2022 – Present
CR Academy
Founded and operated independently. 50+ families. 250+ athletes across 4 camps. Built from nothing.
